message:

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,79 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "dragonfly-925-missing-pfcount",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "dragonfly: Missing PFCOUNT",
+    "description": "Missing PFCOUNT. Requested by 5+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current dragonfly deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your dragonfly version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n dragonfly -l app.kubernetes.io/name=dragonfly\nhelm list -n dragonfly 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working dragonfly installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review dragonfly configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant dragonfly configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n dragonfly -l app.kubernetes.io/name=dragonfly\nkubectl get configmap -n dragonfly -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=dragonfly\n```\nMissing PFCOUNT command on mastodon installation\n\n**To Reproduce**\nSteps to reproduce the behavior:\n1. Replace redis to dragonfly on mastodon installation\n2. Load the mastodon web\n3. Web empty\n4."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Missing PFCOUNT",
+        "description": "This version does not create sparse-encoded HLLs, however it is fully compatible with such ones created by Redis as it converts them to the dense encoding.\n```yaml\n[83618058-3981-4ac1-9d89-7d913e276f63] method=HEAD path=/health format=*/* controller=HealthController action=show status=200 duration=0.36 view=0.19 db=0.00\n[8d0133b7-154c-445d-8392-caa4ff3d7cf0] method=GET path=/api/v1/instance format=*/* controller=Api::V1::InstancesController action=show status=200 duration=1.51 view=0.28 db=0.00\n[f40159fd-6247-4f67-9f03-4e5de65b2a11] method=GET path=/.well-known/nodeinfo format=json controller=WellKnown::NodeInfoController action=index status=200 duration=1.02 view=0.51 db=0.00\n[86aedd5c-da14-4bcd-9df2-899cfd971401] method=GET path=/nodeinfo/2.0 format=*/\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade dragonfly to include the fix",
+        "description": "If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade dragonfly:\n```bash\nhelm repo update\nhelm upgrade dragonfly dragonfly/dragonfly --namespace dragonfly\n```\nVerify the upgrade:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n dragonfly\nhelm list -n dragonfly\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n dragonfly -l app.kubernetes.io/name=dragonfly\nkubectl get events -n dragonfly --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Missing PFCOUNT\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "This version does not create sparse-encoded HLLs, however it is fully compatible with such ones created by Redis as it converts them to the dense encoding.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "[83618058-3981-4ac1-9d89-7d913e276f63] method=HEAD path=/health format=*/* controller=HealthController action=show status=200 duration=0.36 view=0.19 db=0.00\n[8d0133b7-154c-445d-8392-caa4ff3d7cf0] method=GET path=/api/v1/instance format=*/* controller=Api::V1::InstancesController action=show status=200 duration=1.51 view=0.28 db=0.00\n[f40159fd-6247-4f67-9f03-4e5de65b2a11] method=GET path=/.well-known/nodeinfo format=json controller=WellKnown::NodeInfoController action=index status=200 duration=1.02 view=0.51 db=0.00\n[86aedd5c-da14-4bcd-9df2-899cfd971401] method=GET path=/nodeinfo/2.0 format=*/* controller=WellKnown::NodeInfoController action=show status=500 error='Redis::CommandError: ERR unknown command `PFCOUNT`' duration=1.96 view=0.00 db=0.00\n[86aedd5c-da14-4bcd-9df2-899cfd971401]   \n["
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "dragonfly",
